title: Diagnose commons-server.service crash root cause from journal logs

log.message: Created from Congress #70 verdict on: [idea]: service commons-server.service restarted 4x in last 24h — possible flakiness (GitHub issue:

Source verdict: Four restarts in 24 hours is not flakiness — it's a failing service with no root cause identified. Before anyone proposes monitoring improvements or architectural changes, the immediate action is to p...

All 4 restarts in 24h were clean SIGTERM (intentional deployments, not crashes). Latent crash bug found: /admin/congress POST handler uses req.json().then() with no .catch() — if body is empty or malformed JSON, Bun gets an unhandled promise rejection and crashes the process. Secondary issue: handleWalkerInteraction writes to relative candidates/ path but is currently unused.

Root cause: 4 restarts were all clean SIGTERM (intentional deployments). Latent crash bug identified: /admin/congress POST handler had no rejection handler on req.json().then() — malformed/empty body would cause unhandled promise rejection, crashing Bun. Fixed in commit fde61fd.
